suite.name: suite S1779627870026 2

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Add A Product To The Cart

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: And Add Product To Cart And Verify Badge
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Login with valid credentials, add a product to the cart, verify the cart badge shows 1 and the button changes to Remove.

test.name: TC_002 — Sort Products By Price Low To High

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: And Sort Products By Price Low To High And Verify Order
Select Sort Option By Price Low To High
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'css=.product_sort_container' by label Price (low to high).
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Verify Products Are Sorted By Price Ascending
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.

iter.status: No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.

for.status: No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.status: No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.
No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Login with valid credentials, select the sort option Price (low to high) and verify the products are ordered from the lowest price to the highest.
test.status: No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.

test.name: TC_003 — Logout Via Burger Menu

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: And Logout Via Burger Menu And Verify Login Page
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Login with valid credentials, open the burger menu, click Logout and verify the login page is displayed again.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Test suite for SauceDemo — covers cart, sorting and logout scenarios
